generated_exposure.exposure_text: Sanctions don't work. They just hurt regular people while the politicians we're trying to pressure just laugh all the way to the bank. My cousin's family in Iran is suffering because of these so-called 'smart sanctions' that supposedly don't hurt civilians. News flash: they do. We need real diplomacy, not these fake tough-guy economic warfare games that only make things worse. #SanctionsFail #DiplomacyNotWar
